sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The tuning scripts is related to this pr, and it successfull produced efficient fused_moe_triton kernel config for qwen2-57b and mixtral 8x7b in both tp4 fp8_w8a8 condition.

sglang.title: Fix the default chunked prefill size
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This is a follow up for the chunked prefill size adjustment in #2225

Only do chunk size adjustment when the chunked prefill size is not specified by the arguments, so we do not silently change users' arguments.
Use a smaller cuda graph max bs for small memory GPUs because cuda graph typically does

sglang.author: bjmsong

Motivation
relate to this issue 
Usage
python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path {model_path} --lora-paths lora0={lora_path} --disable-radix --disable-cuda-graph --max-loras-per-batch=4

python -m sglang.bench_serving --backend sglang-oai --model {model_path} --num-prompts 1 --lora-name lora0

vllm.title: [platform] Add verify_quantization in platform.
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part of #9268

Add verify_quantization function and move supported_quantization to platform to avoid unlimited if else usage.
Add device_name to  each platform  to distinguish the device name. such as, rocm and cuda

vllm.title: Interleaving sliding window for Ministral-8B-Instruct-2410
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Same as #10584 but for: https://huggingface.co/mistralai/Ministral-8B-Instruct-2410
Test with:
vllm serve mistralai/Ministral-8B-Instruct-2410 --tokenizer_mode mistral --config_format mistral --load_format mistral --revision ref/pr/18

from https://huggingface.co/mistralai/Ministral-8B-Instruct-2410
